title: aconitum × teppneri
intro: Aconitum × teppneri is a hybrid plant species within the Aconitum genus, commonly known as monk's hood or wolf's bane. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, due to the presence of alkaloids such as aconitine and aconitidine. The health benefits of Aconitum × teppneri are said to include pain relief, fever reduction, and potential antimicrobial properties, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity. In herbal preparations, Aconitum × teppneri is often used in small doses, typically in the form of tinctures or infusions, under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
